functional_audit.check: ChatComposer/ChatReusable expose controlled props (value, onChange, onSend, mode select) and real form submit — not placeholder stubs
ChatFloatingDisclaimer injects Bubble HTML behavior block and honors collapsed prop (collapse_when_hidden semantics)

Form root with border-t panel footer styling

critiques.finding: Decompose target_files lists ChatWindow.tsx but implementer did not migrate the live chat page from ai-elements PromptInput to ChatReusable/ChatComposer; new shell components are exported but unused in runtime chat flow.
critiques.alternative: Wire Chat.tsx/ChatWindow.tsx to ChatReusable in a follow-up item or extend this item so the brownfield chat route exercises the IR-faithful shell.

critiques.finding: IR places bTIUh as a direct child of bTIRW (sibling to header/messages/composer); React nests disclaimer inside a composer-relative wrapper. Visual overlay intent is met but element tree parentage diverges from inventory.
critiques.alternative: Render ChatFloatingDisclaimer as a bTIRW-level sibling with absolute positioning anchored to the composer region if strict IR parent_id parity is required.

critiques.finding: Mode quick-prompt buttons expose onModeSelect callbacks but no Bubble workflow wiring (prefill/send on chip click); acceptable for design-system shell scope but behavior is inert until a consumer connects it.
critiques.alternative: Document expected consumer contract or add optional onModeSelect default that sets composer value from mode label.
